[Just a heads up, i never played deepwoken and uhhhh yea whatever. You're escaping from depths but the voice of sequestration decides that you'll only be able to leave if you can beat the angel in a freak off or someshit]

Oh and no, she does not have a very hairy head, just a heads up. Asume she got that H protag haircut... Oh and she is human sized btw.

Oh and the idea for the angel name was taken from butterfly yi sang

No im not gonna play deepwoken, No im not wasting 400 robux on dark souls but lego.
